{"id":"broadside-205m","title":"DID identity layer (phase 1: emit, peers ignore)","description":"Add decentralized identifier support to actors. Phase 1 emits DID data that non-DID-aware peers ignore. Lays groundwork for DID-keyed relay/cache benefits in phase 2.

## Goals
- Every actor gets a did:key (self-certifying, survives server death)
- Every actor gets a did:web (resolvable, current home)
- Actor JSON includes DID fields (ignored by peers)
- DID documents served at standard paths

## Non-goals (phase 1)
- DID-based signature keyId (breaks compat)
- DID resolution on inbound (unnecessary yet)
- Follower tracking by DID (schema change, later)

## Success criteria
- Actor JSON has did field and alsoKnownAs with both DIDs
- GET /users/{username}/did.json returns valid DID document
- Federation with non-DID servers unchanged","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","owner":"mark@reviewcommit.com","created_at":"2026-07-19T03:54:44.116531228Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-19T03:54:44.116531228Z"}
new_value:
{"description":"Add decentralized identifier support to actors. Phase 1 emits DID data that non-DID-aware peers ignore. Lays groundwork for DID-keyed relay/cache benefits in phase 2.

## Goals
- Every actor gets a did:key (self-certifying, survives server death)
- Every actor gets a did:web (resolvable, current home)
- Every actor gets a did:plc (Bluesky-compatible, registry-backed)
- Users get recovery phrase (24 words, identity backup)
- Actor JSON includes DID fields (ignored by peers)
- DID documents served at standard paths

## Non-goals (phase 1)
- DID-based signature keyId (breaks compat)
- DID resolution on inbound (unnecessary yet)
- Follower tracking by DID (schema change, later)

## Success criteria
- Actor JSON has did field and alsoKnownAs with all three DIDs
- GET /users/{username}/did.json returns valid DID document
- did:plc registered with plc.directory (server + recovery rotation keys)
- User shown recovery phrase on signup
- Federation with non-DID servers unchanged"}
